info.name: Aeterna E2E Test Suite
info.description:
Exhaustive end-to-end tests for the Aeterna stack via HTTPS ingress.

1. Deployment Validation — health, readiness, liveness, 404 fallback
2. Admin Features & Configuration — OpenSpec discovery, governance, A2A, MCP
3. Realistic Scenario — Full knowledge CRUD lifecycle
4. MCP Protocol — JSON-RPC initialize, tools/list, tools/call, error handling
5. A2A Protocol — Agent card, health, metrics, task submission
6. Webhook Validation — GitHub webhook endpoint error paths
7. Error Validation — Invalid inputs, missing fields, nonexistent resources
8. Knowledge Layer Tests — Multi-layer creation, PR-track governance
9. MCP Governance Tools — Configure, request lifecycle, audit, roles
10. MCP Memory Tools — Add, delete, feedback, close
11. MCP CCA & Sync Tools — Context assemble, note capture, meta-loop, sync
12. MCP Knowledge & Policy Tools — knowledge_get, knowledge_query
13. Plugin Auth — Bootstrap Flow
14. Plugin Auth — Token Refresh & Logout
15. Auth Guards — Sessions
16. Auth Guards — Knowledge CRUD
17. Auth Guards — Sync
18. Auth Edge Cases — Security Boundaries
19. Authenticated Memory Lifecycle
20. Authenticated Knowledge — Multi-layer & Governance
21. Authenticated Governance — Drift & Proposals
22. Authenticated Sync Bridge
23. Authenticated CCA Capabilities
24. Full Authenticated Journey — End-to-End

Without it, duplicate charges occur on network retry. Discovered during load testing 2026-04-13.", "layer": "project", "importance": 0.9, "metadata": {"source": "alice-daily-e2e", "ts": "{{dailyScenarioTs}}", "tags": ["payments", "idempotency", "critical"]}}, "tenantContext": {"tenant_id": "{{tenantId}}", "org_id": "e2e-org", "team_id": "e2e-team", "project_id": "e2e-payments", "user_id": "{{pluginGithubLogin}}"}}}

item.name: 40.5 [Developer] Create knowledge entry — idempotency pattern ADR

body.raw:
{"content": "# Idempotency Pattern — Payments Service

All mutating endpoints in the payments service MUST require an `X-Idempotency-Key` header. The key must be a UUID v4 generated by the caller. The server deduplicates requests with the same key within a 24h window.

## Rationale
Network retries on POST /charge caused duplicate charges in production load tests.

## Implementation
Middleware: `payments_service::middleware::idempotency`
Storage: Redis with 24h TTL keyed by `idempotency:{key}`", "path": "patterns/idempotency-payments-{{dailyScenarioTs}}", "layer": "project", "tags": ["payments", "idempotency", "middleware", "pattern"], "metadata": {"author": "{{pluginGithubLogin}}", "source": "alice-daily-e2e"}}

All backend services making payments calls must generate UUID v4 idempotency keys. Originally discovered by developer during load test 2026-04-13.", "layer": "team", "importance": 0.95, "metadata": {"source": "bob-teamlead-e2e", "promoted_from": "project", "ts": "{{dailyScenarioTs}}", "tags": ["payments", "idempotency", "team-standard"]}}, "tenantContext": {"tenant_id": "{{tenantId}}", "org_id": "e2e-org", "team_id": "e2e-team", "project_id": "e2e-payments", "user_id": "{{pluginGithubLogin}}"}}}

exec: pm.test('[Team Lead] Promoted memory stored at team layer', () => {

item.name: 40.11 [Team Lead] Create team-layer ADR — idempotency mandate

body.raw:
{"content": "# ADR-042: Mandatory Idempotency Keys for Mutating HTTP Endpoints

**Status**: Accepted
**Date**: 2026-04-13
**Authors**: Backend Team

## Decision
All mutating HTTP endpoints (POST, PUT, PATCH) across backend services MUST support and validate `X-Idempotency-Key` headers. Services without this support are non-compliant.

## Consequences
- Positive: eliminates duplicate side effects on client retries
- Negative: slight overhead for key storage in Redis
- Migration: existing services have 2 sprint remediation window", "path": "adr/042-idempotency-mandate-{{dailyScenarioTs}}", "layer": "team", "tags": ["adr", "idempotency", "api-standards", "team"], "metadata": {"author": "{{pluginGithubLogin}}", "adr_number": "042", "source": "bob-teamlead-e2e"}}

item.name: 40.21 [Architect] Create org knowledge — idempotency policy rationale

body.raw:
{"content": "# Org Policy: API Idempotency

**Effective**: 2026-Q2
**Owner**: Architecture Guild

All REST services operating in production MUST implement idempotency for mutating operations. This policy was initiated following a payments service incident (load test 2026-04-13) where duplicate charges occurred due to missing idempotency controls.

## Scope
All teams, all services, all environments.

## Enforcement
Compliance verified via governance drift detection. Non-compliant services flagged in architecture review queue.", "path": "policies/api/idempotency-org-{{dailyScenarioTs}}", "layer": "org", "tags": ["policy", "idempotency", "api", "org-wide"], "metadata": {"author": "{{pluginGithubLogin}}", "source": "carol-architect-e2e", "policy_version": "1.0"}}
